title: Interactive Lewis Structure Builder
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: AP Chemistry
description: Step-by-step MicroSim for constructing Lewis structures with electron tracking and octet feedback.

learningObjectives: Follow the six-step Lewis structure algorithm
Evaluate octet completion and multiple bond formation

keyQuestions: How many valence electrons does this molecule have?
commonMisconceptions: Octet is satisfied before checking the central atom
assessmentOpportunities: Ask students to justify when Step 6 is required for a chosen molecule
